pageProps.content:
["$r",null,null,{"children":[["$r","h2",null,{"id":"项目简介","children":"项目简介"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"EPEL(Extra Packages for Enterprise Linux) 是由 Fedora Special Interest Group 维护的 Enterprise Linux（RHEL、CentOS）中经常用到的包。"}],"
",["$r","h2",null,{"id":"使用方法","children":"使用方法"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"下面以 Rocky Linux 9 为例讲解如何使用本镜像站的 epel 镜像。RHEL 及其他衍生发行版同样可用该方法。"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":"首先从 Extras 里安装 epel-release："}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-0","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["用如下命令自动替换：（修改自 ",["$r","a",null,{"href":"https://github.com/tuna/issues/issues/687","rel":"nofollow","children":"https://github.com/tuna/issues/issues/687"}],"）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-1","codeLanguage":"bash"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":[["$r","code",null,{"children":"epel.repo"}]," 的修改结果如下：（仅供参考，不同版本可能不同）"]}],"
",["$r","CodeBlock",null,{"menus":[],"templateId":"template-2","codeLanguage":"ini"}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["由于无法同步，镜像站不包含 EPEL Cisco OpenH264 仓库（",["$r","code",null,{"children":"epel-cisco-openh264.repo"}],"），如果不需要可手动将其改为 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"enabled=0"}],"。"]}],"
",["$r","p",null,{"children":["运行 ",["$r","code",null,{"children":"dnf update"}]," 测试一下吧。"]}]]}]

compiledTemplates.template-0: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("dnf install epel-release");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}

{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b(t.v(t.f("sudo",c,p,0)));t.b("sed -e 's!^metalink=!#metalink=!g' \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    -e 's!^#baseurl=!baseurl=!g' \");t.b("
" + i);t.b("    -e 's!https\?://download\.fedoraproject\.org/pub/epel!");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("!g' \");t.b("

compiledTemplates.template-2:
{code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("[epel]");t.b("
" + i);t.b("name=Extra Packages for Enterprise Linux $releasever - $basearch");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# It is much more secure to use the metalink, but if you wish to use a local mirror");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# place its address here.");t.b("
" + i);t.b("baseurl=");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/$releasever/Everything/$basearch/");t.b("
" + i);t.b("#metalink=https://mirrors.fedoraproject.org/metalink?repo=epel-$releasever&arch=$basearch&infra=$infra&content=$contentdir");t.b("
" + i);t.b("enabled=1");t.b("
" + i);t.b("gpgcheck=1");t.b("
" + i);t.b("countme=1");t.b("
" + i);t.b("gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-EPEL-$releasever");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("[epel-debuginfo]");t.b("
" + i);t.b("name=Extra Packages for Enterprise Linux $releasever - $basearch - Debug");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# It is much more secure to use the metalink, but if you wish to use a local mirror");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# place its address here.");t.b("
" + i);t.b("baseurl=");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/$releasever/Everything/$basearch/debug/");t.b("
" + i);t.b("#metalink=https://mirrors.fedoraproject.org/metalink?repo=epel-debug-$releasever&arch=$basearch&infra=$infra&content=$contentdir");t.b("
" + i);t.b("enabled=0");t.b("
" + i);t.b("gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-EPEL-$releasever");t.b("
" + i);t.b("gpgcheck=1");t.b("
");t.b("
" + i);t.b("[epel-source]");t.b("
" + i);t.b("name=Extra Packages for Enterprise Linux $releasever - $basearch - Source");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# It is much more secure to use the metalink, but if you wish to use a local mirror");t.b("
" + i);t.b("# place its address here.");t.b("
" + i);t.b("baseurl=");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("/$releasever/Everything/source/tree/");t.b("
" + i);t.b("#metalink=https://mirrors.fedoraproject.org/metalink?repo=epel-source-$releasever&arch=$basearch&infra=$infra&content=$contentdir");t.b("
" + i);t.b("enabled=0");t.b("
" + i);t.b("gpgkey=file:///etc/pki/rpm-gpg/RPM-GPG-KEY-EPEL-$releasever");t.b("
" + i);t.b("gpgcheck=1");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
